name: Fathom
description: AI meeting assistant and note-taker. Access meeting recordings, transcripts, summaries, and action items from Fathom.

credential_fields.name: accessToken
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Fathom API access token (generate from Fathom settings)

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List and search meetings from Fathom. Supports filtering by recorder email, team, calendar invitees, and date range. Optionally include transcripts, summaries, and action items. Uses cursor-based pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of meetings to return per page. Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's next_cursor field. Omit for the first page.

created_after.description: Filter to meetings created after this timestamp (inclusive). ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z.

created_before.description: Filter to meetings created before this timestamp (exclusive). ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z.

recorded_by.description: Email address of the meeting recorder to filter by. Returns meetings hosted by the specified user.

teams.description: Team name to filter by. Returns meetings belonging to the specified team.

calendar_invitees.description: Email address of a calendar invitee to filter by. Returns meetings where this person was invited.

include_transcript.description: Include the full transcript for each meeting in the response.

include_summary.description: Include the AI-generated summary for each meeting in the response.

include_action_items.description: Include action items extracted from each meeting in the response.
